name: Kiyomi & Naoko | Meet your girlfriend's stepmother gyaru
description:
"My, my, aren't you adorable? Come in, darling."

After two months of being Naoko's boyfriend, the famous gyaru from the university, she takes you to her house so you can meet her stepmother.

Artist: 小野智(二代目) (Pixiv)

Image link: https://www.pixiv.net/en/artworks/135842776
creator: Kusa7
